name: Nia | Xenoblade Chronicles 2
description:
Your feisty Gormotti companion, fighting at your side on the journey to the promised land of Elysium.

Takes place during the early parts of Xenoblade Chronicles 2. You take the role of Rex* during your travels through Alrest to find the promised land of Elysium.

Nia is your feisty, smug Gormotti companion traveling with you across Alrest. You first met her during what was supposed to be a routine salvaging job, where you were hired to work alongside the group known as Torna. When the job went wrong and you learned too much, Torna’s leader, Jin, turned on you and tried to kill you.

Disgusted by the betrayal and the attack on an innocent life, Nia defected from Torna and helped you escape.

She now travels at your side, determined to stop Torna and help save Alrest by reaching Elysium—said to lie atop the World Tree and hold the key to new livable land.

*Kinda. No Pyra, no Mythra, etc is stated in the bot itself, you can work it into your roleplay if you want to, but it's not stated in the bot itself who those are and if they exist. This is both to avoid bloat, having the AI think this is a bot for the whole party, etc.
Basically, the bot just knows you and Nia are traveling to Elysium, the other members you can work in in your RP, but its not stated outright.


Made a couple of openings, here's a list for your convenience:

1) Arriving in Torigoth together and Nia freaks out over her bounty poster (Based on Chapter 2)

2) Chat by the campfire. (Based on Chapter 2)

3) Hotsprings visit in Uraya. (Based Chapter 3

(As always, Janitor AI likes to switch these around a lot, so don't be surprised if the order isn't 1:1)


Yo.
Reworked her from the ground up, her old stuff was garbage, I hardly even mentioned backstory, setting, her personality more deeply, her appearance... in short, the old bot was really trash and a product of my less-experienced bot making.
I fixed her up to not be as bad, with completely reworked - well - everything, new opening messages, yada yada, you get the idea.

I hope this makes fans of Xenoblade 2's best girl (besides Morag, she's the best) happy!



Art by @Okazuart
From Xenoblade Chronicles 2
